scripts.docs:compile_re_doc: yarn openapi-generator-cli validate -i website/static/openapi.json && docker run --rm -v "${PWD}:/workspace" -w /workspace node:20-bookworm-slim bash -lc 'npm install -g @redocly/cli@1.25.11 >/dev/null && redocly build-docs website/static/openapi.json -o website/static/api-docs.html'
scripts.docs:build: yarn docs:compile_re_doc && cd website && yarn build
scripts.postcommit:setup-tests: docker compose run -u root -w /home/module --rm rest_full bin/setup-tests
scripts.format:ruby: docker compose run -u root -w /home/module --rm rest_full bash -lc 'bundle config set path vendor && bundle install -j $(nproc) && bundle exec rubocop -A .'
scripts.format:erb: docker compose run -u root -w /home/module --rm rest_full bash -lc 'bundle config set path vendor && bundle install -j $(nproc) && bundle exec erblint --lint-all --enable-all-linters --autocorrect'
scripts.format: yarn format:ruby && yarn format:erb && yarn format:packs
scripts.postcommit: yarn postcommit:setup-tests && yarn format && yarn gen:openapi-spec && yarn gen:node-client && yarn docs:compile_re_doc
